Unfortunately, Josh and Patrick don't get along too well. But, when a couple of Russians (Nora Dunn, Perry Anzilotti) see Buddy playing on TV and decide t

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Boy
programme.desc: When Scott and Teresa learn that their son, Austin, is autistic and has brittle bone disease, they initially worry about his future. However, with Scott's growing faith and Austin's incredible spirit, they become unbreakable as they find joy, gratitude and courage in the most trying times.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women -- bred for intelligence and obedience -- embark on an expedition to colonize a distant planet. When they uncover disturbing secrets about the mission, they defy their training and begin to explore their most primitive natures. As life on the ship descends into chaos, they soon become consumed by fear, lust and an insatiabl

programme.title: Jurassic World Dominion
programme.desc: Four years after the destruction of Isla Nublar, dinosaurs now live and hunt alongside humans all over the world. This fragile balance will reshape the future and determine, once and for all, whether human beings are to remain the apex predators on a planet they now share with history's most fearsome creatures.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of allies, Lt. Jim Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, Batman is able to keep a tight lid on crime in Gotham City. But when a young criminal calling himself the Joker suddenly throws the town into chaos, the caped crusader begins to tread a fine line between heroism and vigilantism.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: A young Donald Trump, eager to make his name as the hungry second son of a wealthy family in the 1970s New York, comes under the spell of cutthroat lawyer Roy Cohn. Cohn sees in Trump the perfect protégé: someone with raw ambition, a hunger for success, and a willingness to do whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent decides to try laser eye surgery; police cruiser gets a new slogan.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Oscar take Davis on a camping trip; Hank finally wakes up with a good hair day.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash reconnects with the man who got him to Canada.

programme.title: We Met in December
programme.desc: After a magical night sharing hopes, dreams and a perfect kiss, strangers Annie and Dave lose each other with no way to connect. They embark on a quest to find each other by Christmas.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: All That Glitters
programme.desc: A killer pursues a woman (Lori Loughlin) after she buys a storage unit that contains something valuable.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th President of the United States.

programme.title: The Man With the Golden Gun
programme.desc: Cool government operative James Bond (Roger Moore) searches for a stolen invention that can turn the sun's heat into a destructive weapon. He soon crosses paths with the menacing Francisco Scaramanga (Christopher Lee), a hit man so skilled he has a seven-figure working fee. Bond then joins forces with the swimsuit-clad Mary Goodnight (Britt Ekland), and together they track Scaramanga to a tropical

programme.title: Shayda
programme.desc: Shayda, a brave Iranian mother, finds refuge in an Australian women's shelter with her six-year-old daughter, where they take solace in new beginnings. When the estranged husband and father re-enters their lives, Shayda's path to freedom is jeopardized.

programme.title: Dr. No
programme.desc: In the film that launched the James Bond saga, Agent 007 (Sean Connery) battles mysterious Dr. No, a scientific genius bent on destroying the U.S. space program. As the countdown to disaster begins, Bond must go to Jamaica, where he encounters beautiful Honey Ryder (Ursula Andress), to confront a megalomaniacal villain in his massive island headquarters.

programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans, then a robbery at a neighbor's home leads to a misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and bloodshed.
